description: Configure a project and submit a timesheet for employee Ethan Davis for the current week. Create a customer named 'Midwest Energy Cooperative' and a project 'Annual Turbine Maintenance 2024' with 'Admin User' as the Project Admin. Include three activities for this project: 'Turbine Inspection', 'Parts Replacement', and 'Safety Testing'. Record the following hours on the timesheet: 8.00 on Monday (Turbine Inspection); 6.00 on Tuesday (Turbine Inspection) and 2.00 (Parts Replacement); 8.00 on Wednesday (Parts Replacement); 4.00 on Thursday (Parts Replacement) and 4.00 (Safety Testing); and 8.00 on Friday (Safety Testing). Ensure the final timesheet status is 'Submitted'.
